name: Oatmeal Muffins (Crouse)
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the oatmeal in sour milk overnight.
2. In the morning, add the remaining ingredients to the oatmeal mixture. You may also add chopped dates or raisins if desired.
3. Mix everything together until well combined.
4. Pour the batter into a greased muffin tin and bake for 25 minutes at 400-450°F (200-230°C).
5. Makes approximately 14 muffins.
